backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Report mapping implemented features to related source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Reference list providing short descriptions for various frontend files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining color tokens, dark theme variables, and base styles.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry file loading fonts, metadata, root app container, and main.tsx script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling initial page loader and rendering all sections with background effects and cursor follower.
frontend/src/components/common/GlassCard: Glassmorphism card component with blur, translucent background, and optional hover effects.
frontend/src/components/common/Section.t: Reusable layout wrapper providing section IDs, spacing, and container styling.
frontend/src/components/effects/Animated: Animated floating orb background using blurred neon-colored divs.
frontend/src/components/effects/CursorFo: Custom animated cursor and trailing glow that follows mouse movement unless reduced-motion or touch input is detected.
frontend/src/components/effects/NoiseOve: Full-screen noise texture overlay for subtle grain effect.
frontend/src/components/interactive/Magn: Wrapper that creates a magnetic hover movement effect unless reduced-motion is enabled.
frontend/src/components/motion/PageLoade: Initial loading screen with animated logo and pulsing dots.
frontend/src/components/motion/Reveal.ts: Scroll-reveal wrapper animating children into view using IntersectionObserver and directional transitions.
frontend/src/components/nav/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navbar that highlights active section, hides on scroll down, and supports smooth scrolling with a mobile sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/projects/Project: Interactive project card with tilt effect, hover actions, tags, and links to live and GitHub pages.
Filter button group allowing users to switch active project categories.
frontend/src/components/skills/SkillProg: Animated skill bar that triggers on scroll using intersection observer and increments level display.
frontend/src/components/timeline/Timelin: Timeline component rendering animated alternating items with icons and descriptive content.
frontend/src/data/projects.ts: Static list of project metadata including titles, descriptions, categories, images, URLs, and tags.
frontend/src/data/timeline.ts: Static timeline data defining experience and education items with periods and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refetching dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Hook managing contact form state, validation, submission simulation, and success handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and provider for managing Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, including login state and persisted identity handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useParallax.ts: A hook that calculates parallax transform values based on scroll position, respecting reduced-motion preferences.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotionPrefe: Detects the user's reduced-motion preference via matchMedia and updates on changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDirection.ts: Tracks scroll direction with a threshold using requestAnimationFrame for performance.
frontend/src/hooks/useTypingText.ts: Implements a typing and deleting text animation cycling through an array of strings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining dark theme variables, neon effects, custom scrollbar styles, and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point initializing React, query client, and wrapping App with InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/motion/variants.ts: Exports framer-motion style animation variant objects for fades, slides, scale, and stagger effects.
frontend/src/sections/AboutSection.tsx: Renders the About section with profile image, bio text, tech stack, and highlights using reveal animations.
frontend/src/sections/ContactSection.tsx: Displays contact info, social links, and a contact form integrated with useContactForm.
Shows experience and education timeline using the Timeline component and reveal animations.
frontend/src/sections/FooterSection.tsx: Renders a footer with copyright text, attribution link, and a smooth scroll-to-top button.
frontend/src/sections/HeroSection.tsx: Defines the hero section with parallax background, animated name and role typing, and CTA buttons.
frontend/src/sections/ProjectsSection.ts: Displays a filterable grid of project cards with reveal animations.
frontend/src/sections/SkillsSection.tsx: Shows categorized skill cards with icons and animated progress bars.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with dark mode, custom neon colors, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Contains project metadata, design goals, required images, and implemented feature records.
